title: lamium garganicum var. armenum
intro: Lamium garganicum var. armenum, also known as Armenian Spurred Viper's Bugloss, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lamium garganicum var. armenum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
